archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) - Light Variant / Old Money Editorial

strategies: Headings should primarily use font-light or font-normal to emphasize elegance.
Overlines and small labels MUST be uppercase, tiny (text-xs), and widely spaced (tracking-[0.2em]).
Do not use generic sans for any main headings.
Line height: leading-none for massive headers (text-5xl+), leading-relaxed for body.
Body font (Manrope) provides a crisp, modern geometric contrast to the classic serif headings.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Editorial Minimalism. Treat the screen like a high-end fashion magazine spread. Massive negative space.
spacing_and_layout.scale: Generous use of py-24, py-32, gap-16, gap-24.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Mode A ('Tetris' Grid) for Marketing/Gallery. Asymmetric, overlapping images. Mode B for Admin Dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Ultra-thin 1px borders (border-[#2D2420]/10) to define sections instead of heavy shadows.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Images scale slowly (duration-700) on hover. Buttons should invert colors or slightly fade (bg-[#2D2420]/90).
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Smooth scrolling (Lenis) is mandatory for the landing page.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use easing for all transitions. Avoid bouncy/springy animations; use slow, deliberate fades and slides.

component_guidelines.landing_page: Avoid Shadcn Cards. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for asymmetric, fluid layouts. Large typography (text-6xl+).
component_guidelines.dashboard: Use Shadcn components but strip the 'Vercel-look'. Use flat rectangular styles with 1px borders (border-[#2D2420]/10). No border-radius (rounded-none) for a sharp, tailored look.
component_guidelines.forms: Inputs should have underline-only borders (border-b) or very thin, sharp rectangles. No pill-shaped inputs. Use rounded-none.
component_guidelines.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary button: bg-[#2D2420] text-[#FDFBF7]. Secondary: border border-[#2D2420] text-[#2D2420].
component_guidelines.cards: Remove shadows. Use flat surfaces with subtle 1px borders. Add p-6 or p-8 for generous internal breathing room.

media_and_images.description: Woman in beige coat on stairs. Use for the main hero section of the landing page.
Boutique interior with dresses on rack.
Woman in patterned dress peeking around a corner.
Scissors cutting wire on black background. Use for tailoring precision service.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #2D2420 text on #FDFBF7 meets APCA guidelines for high contrast.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute with kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button')

icons.style: Minimalist, thin strokes. Size 20px for standard icons, 16px for inline.

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply Manrope for all standard text (install via Google Fonts if not present) and keep Cormorant Garamond for headings.
In the Dashboard, remove all heavy shadows from cards. Override Shadcn rounded corners with rounded-none or max rounded-sm for a sharp editorial aesthetic.
The landing page should feature generous padding, subtle border lines (1px solid #2D2420 with 10% opacity) separating sections, and a highly elegant layout with overlapping images.
